# What it is

This site: a home base for my projects, a place to practice coding outside work, and a way to connect with others. Built with Quarto—responsive, searchable, and easy to tweak.

# Why I did it

I wanted a single place to point people (employers, collaborators, friends) that wasn't LinkedIn or a CV. Also wanted to get comfortable with Quarto and static sites.

# What I learned (or am hoping to learn)

Quarto's flexibility (R, Python, or neither), how to keep content and structure maintainable with templates, and how to wire up a simple sidebar + search without overdoing it. Still iterating on tone and what to put in "projects" vs "posts."

# Links

- **Repo:** [GitHub](https://github.com/RiversPharmD/ztr_website)
- **Site:** [Live site](https://riverspharmd.github.io/ztr_website)
